case_title: GIRON, CARLOS VS REDTOP CARPET,INC.DBA GOLDEN GATE INTERIORS

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR FREE INTERPRETER FOR INDI- GENT LITIGANTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIRON, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REDTOP CARPET,INC.DBA GOLDEN GATE INTERIORS $1,972.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,972.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-31-2003, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIRON, CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REDTOP CARPET,INC.DBA GOLDEN GATE INTERIORS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
